source_pr.title: planner: eliminate ifnull in expression rewriting process
source_pr.body:
<!--
Thank you for contributing to TiDB! Please read TiDB's [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md) document **BEFORE** filing this PR.
-->

### What problem does this PR solve? <!--add issue link with summary if exists-->
```
mysql> show create table t;
+-------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Table | Create Table                                                                                                                                          |
+-------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| t     | CREATE TABLE `t` (
  `a` int(11) DEFAULT NULL,
  `nb` int(11) NOT NULL,
  `nc` int(11) NOT NULL
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8 COLLATE=utf8_bin |
+-------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
1 row in set (0.00 sec)
``` 

Before this PR, 
```
mysql> explain select 1+ifnull(nb, 0) from t where nb=1;
+-----------------------+----------+------+------------------------------------------------------------+
| id                    | count    | task | operator info                                              |
+-----------------------+----------+------+------------------------------------------------------------+
| Projection_4          | 10.00    | root | plus(1, ifnull(test.t.nb, 0))                                         |
| └─TableReader_7       | 10.00    | root | data:Selection_6                                           |
|   └─Selection_6       | 10.00    | cop  | eq(test.t.nb, 1)                                           |
|     └─TableScan_5     | 10000.00 | cop  | table:t, range:[-inf,+inf], keep order:false, stats:pseudo |
+-----------------------+----------+------+------------------------------------------------------------+
4 rows in set (0.00 sec)
```
After,

```
mysql> explain select 1+ifnull(nb, 0) from t where nb=1;
+-----------------------+----------+------+------------------------------------------------------------+
| id                    | count    | task | operator info                                              |
+-----------------------+----------+------+------------------------------------------------------------+
| Projection_4          | 10.00    | root | plus(1, test.t.nb)                                         |
| └─TableReader_7       | 10.00    | root | data:Selection_6                                           |
|   └─Selection_6       | 10.00    | cop  | eq(test.t.nb, 1)                                           |
|     └─TableScan_5     | 10000.00 | cop  | table:t, range:[-inf,+inf], keep order:false, stats:pseudo |
+-----------------------+----------+------+------------------------------------------------------------+
4 rows in set (0.00 sec)
```
### What is changed and how it works?
When converting model.ColumnInfo to expression.Column, we also pass flag info which can be used during epression rewriting stage.

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

 - Unit test
 - Integration test

Related changes
 - Need to cherry-pick to the release branch

symptoms: sql: "select ifnull(t1.h, t2.b) from t t1 left join t t2 on t1.e=t2.e order by ifnull(t1.h, t2.b) limit 5", (planner/core/logical_plan_test.go)
failure_signature: sql: "select ifnull(t1.h, t2.b) from t t1 left join t t2 on t1.e=t2.e order by ifnull(t1.h, t2.b) limit 5", (planner/core/logical_plan_test.go)
fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.

evidence: evidence: sql: "select ifnull(t1.h, t2.b) from t t1 left join t t2 on t1.e=t2.e order by ifnull(t1.h, t2.b) limit 5", (planner/core/logical_plan_test.go)
files: cmd/explaintest/r/explain_easy.result, cmd/explaintest/t/explain_easy.test, planner/core/expression_rewriter.go, planner/core/logical_plan_builder.go, planner/core/logical_plan_test.go
